---
title: "HCV Household Transmission"
subtitle: Aïda Traore, Natalie Olson, Jean-Pierre Moles
bibliography: rmd/references.bib

format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
  docx: default
---

## Introduction

{{< include rmd/intro.rmd >}}

## Methods

{{< include rmd/methods.rmd >}}

## Results

{{< include rmd/results.rmd >}}

## Abstract

{{< include rmd/abstract.rmd >}}

## References
